title: Canadian Mint Hash Browns
description: A delicious and easy side dish featuring crispy hash browns with a hint of mint. Perfect for any breakfast or brunch.
instructions: Peel the potatoes and grate them.
In a large bowl, combine the grated potatoes, chopped mint, and hash.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Add the potato mixture to the pan and press down to form a flat layer.
Cook for 4-5 minutes or until the bottom is golden brown.
Flip the hash browns over and cook for another 4-5 minutes or until the other side is also golden brown.
